author: lukaszrozmej
content:
<@372731338031366165> something that might interest you, we implemented direct streaming to wire from evm for debug_trace endpoints and achieved up to 99,99% memory reduction on the server: https://github.com/NethermindEth/nethermind/pull/11693 + big performance increase

The only downside is it is streaming so if something breaks in the middle (timeout, exception), user gets torn response.

author: lukaszrozmej
content: We will do the same for trace_ endpoints
